name: flavokavain A
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: redox-active and cytostatic signaling with apoptosis-related effects reported in cell models; no established human mechanism.
contraindications: No isolated-compound clinical interaction set established
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: redox-active and cytostatic signaling with apoptosis-related effects reported in cell models; no established human mechanism.
